title: PrefillShare — Shared Prefill for Multi-LLM
summary_zh: 量化多模型 agent 管線（Planner→Coder→Reviewer）中的冗餘 prefill，提出跨模型共享 prefill 模組以實現 KV 重用。
summary_en: Quantifies redundant prefill in multi-model agent pipelines (Planner->Coder->Reviewer) and proposes cross-model shared prefill modules for KV reuse.
